starGuide.title: What is the STAR-L Method?
starGuide.description: A structured framework for presenting your experiences logically and specifically to interviewers.

s.label: Situation
s.desc: Describe the background and context of your experience.

t.label: Task
t.desc: Explain the problem or challenge you needed to solve in that situation.

a.label: Action
a.desc: Detail the specific actions you took to address the problem.

r.label: Result
r.desc: Share the outcomes of your actions with specific metrics.

l.label: Lesson
l.desc: Reflect on what you learned and how you grew from this experience.

dialog.description: Describe your achievement using the STAR-L method.

placeholders.situationTask: Describe the context and the challenge you faced.
placeholders.action: What specific actions did you take?
placeholders.result: What was the outcome? Use metrics if possible.
placeholders.lesson: What did you learn from this experience?

dialog.title: Wait! Your key achievement information is incomplete.
dialog.description:
To generate high-quality interview questions, Situation, Action, and Result information is essential.

Some information is currently missing, which may affect the quality of generated questions. Would you like to complete the information?
